name: Aon plc
lede: Aon runs six capability centers across five Indian cities. Bengaluru, Gurugram, Noida, Chennai and Mumbai, covering gbs, gcc/gic and ssc, built over twenty years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aon office in India. We map six, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aon plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aon runs 6 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram, Noida, Chennai, Mumbai), covering gbs, gcc/gic and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership

Chief People Officer - Global Centre’s of Excellence & People Org leader India

about.description: Aon's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Gurugram, Noida, Chennai and Mumbai, spanning gbs, gcc/gic and ssc. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 34 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Aon operate in India?
faq.a: Aon operates 6 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aon have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Aon's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru, Gurugram, Noida, Chennai and Mumbai.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Aon run in India?
faq.a: Aon runs gbs, gcc/gic and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aon's India GCCs?
faq.a: Aon's India centers employ in the 5,000 to 10,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aon's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 34 leaders at Aon's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
